title: Error handling binary file in Gemini node
symptom: When attempting to send a binary file to the Gemini node, the error 'binaryPropertyNames.split is not a function' occurs, indicating a problem with how the binary data is being processed.
applies_when: Sending binary data from a form submission
not_this_if: Binary data is correctly formatted and sent without errors
root_cause: The error arises when the binary file is not being handled correctly, often due to incorrect configuration of the input data field in the Gemini node. Specifically, treating the binary file as a regular property instead of as a binary file can lead to this issue.
fix_steps: In the 'Input Data Field Name(s)', ensure the binary file field (e.g., 'Take_a_Photo') is set as 'Binary File(s)'
Test the workflow again to see if the error persists
agent_instruction: Configure the Gemini node to correctly handle the binary file by setting the appropriate input data field.
